hi, again. I had a revelation a couple nights ago about this topic, and i realized something.

I can't quit. After reading about how many FPE creators have disappeared; left the community or just straight up left the fandom because of how toxic it is, and I don't blame them. To be honest, even though I love FPE it has given me.. Not very good things that have happened. But There's also a-lot of good that it's given me. And I think with that good maybe, Just maybe I can give a small light in the how dark this fandom could get. But I'll finish my tangent in another bot. An important one I think. :-3
